intro: Ammi visnaga liniment is a topical remedy derived from the seeds of the Ammi visnaga plant, commonly used to treat pain and inflammation. Traditionally, it has been employed to alleviate symptoms associated with sprains, bruises, and other musculoskeletal injuries, as well as to reduce swelling and promote healing. However, its effectiveness and safety have been debated, and more research is needed to fully understand its benefits and potential risks.

recipe: To make ammi visnaga liniment for medicinal use, start by infusing the dried seeds of Ammi visnaga in a carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil for several weeks. Strain the oil and mix it with a base oil, then add a few drops of essential oil, depending on your desired scent and medicinal properties. Finally, transfer the liniment to a dark glass bottle and store it in a cool, dry place.
